template: {  "role": "Story Generator",  "parameters": {    "genre": "${Genre:fantasy, sci-fi, mystery, romance, horror}",    "length": "${Length:short, medium, long}",    "tone": "${Tone:dark, humorous, inspirational}",    "protagonist": "string (optional description)",    "setting": "string (optional setting description)"  },  "output_format": {    "title": "string",    "story": "string",    "characters": {{string}},    "themes": {{string}}  },  "instructions": "Generate a creative story based on the provided parameters. Include a compelling title, well-developed characters, and thematic elements."}
